{{Quote|Burtt and I were on guard when the Hoojibs hit, Princess! Our blasters still work!|A Rebel soldier, to Leia Organa|<ref name="marvel55" />}}
'''Burtt''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer and part of a survey team under [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] assigned to scout out the planet [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] in the hopes of establishing a permanent Rebel base. One of Burtt's functions included guarding the survey team's [[Plastent/Legends|plastent]] quarters at night while they slept. Burtt was one of the first to discover that members of a small, indigenous species known as [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]] were stealing energy reserves from the team's weaponry. That same evening, an alien creature known as a [[Slivilith]] attacked the base camp. The Slivilith grabbed Burtt about the waist with its tail, and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] had to wrestle him from the creature's grasp. The Slivilith was soon killed, and Burtt returned to the base camp with the others.<ref name="marvel55" />

==Behind the scenes==
Burtt shares his name with ''[[Star Wars]]'' sound designer [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="marvel55" />
